title: Copper addict
description: Adds new features to copper (tools, conductivity), and brings the COPPER GOD!
body:
**__Requirements:__** fabric-api and fabric-kotlin-api ## You ever wonder what to do with the ton of copper you mined ? Don't look any further! This mod provides new features around copper with a Copper God that gives you some shards of his power based on the copper you offer him! Get ready to thunderstruck your enemies and enjoy the power of hasty tools. This mod features will enable by themselves as you mine copper and process with advancements (e.g. unlock new recipes). ## Main features ### Copper mined counter Now when you press tab you'll find the number of copper ore you have mined (single and multiplayer (_farming race anyone?_))

In order to interact with the oratory, you must be **worthy**, hence having mined enough copper ore (see spoiler for exact values). ### Copper items **Thunder sword**, and **hasty tools** (pickaxe, axe, shovel) + hoe, and a helper book for the oratory.

All those tools recipes will be given after mining some copper. (can also be found in spoiler) ### Items Charges **Items can be charged** by trading copper blocks (in your offhand, right click with the sword or pickaxe, it will consume up to 15 blocks to generate charges.), or by using the oratory. When your sword is charged, you have a chance to **summon a powerful thunderbolt** on the entity you are hitting. With the tools (except hoe) when you break some specific blocks you **gain some haste** for a short duration.

### New block One new block has been introduced, the Cu Diamond, used as a base for the copper oratory.

### The Oratory: The oratory instructions are available in the copper book (given after enough mining, or can also be crafted). Once built the Copper God will manifest itself and ask for offering in exchange for some power.

It accepts a stack of iron ingots in exchange for 30 charges of power and a 30% repair of all your copper items. You are also granted the "Under copper" effect which boosts the effect of your charges and give you an hint of what is a true copper disciple. Beware to not give him any impure items!
Spoiler ### Copper mined counter You need to break 64 ore to be worthy.

### Items craft

### New block

### The Oratory: The oratory can be built with 4 cu diamond blocks and one thunderbolt on top. As you would have done for an iron golem. Once you put the latest block of the structure, the copper god will manifest itself and ask for offering in exchange for some power.
